description: Go SDK for EuroMail — GDPR-compliant transactional email API (EU data residency, Finland). Send emails, manage domains, templates, webhooks, contact lists, and AI agent mailboxes.
rules: All methods take context.Context as first argument
Use euromail.String("value") helper for optional string pointer fields
SendEmail() returns SendEmailResponse with .ID and .Status where status is 'queued'
Use TemplateAlias field (not TemplateID) when sending with a template
DnsRecords is map[string]DnsRecord keyed by purpose (dkim, return_path) with .Host field
The From field must use the apex domain, not the sending subdomain (em.yourdomain.com)
Agent mailbox: GetNextMailboxMessage() → process → AckMailboxMessage() with LeaseToken
